headline: US Officials Banned 2029 Over Token Sponsorship

article.title: US officials barred until 2029 from issuing or sponsoring tokens under CLARITY’s proposed ethics rules
article.summary: According to Senator Cynthia Lummis, one of the bill’s advocates, the ethics language would apply to US presidents’ crypto ventures, including Donald Trump’s.

headline: Anthropic Enters UK FCA AI Sandbox Amid 2nd Launch

article.title: Anthropic joins UK FCA’s AI regulatory sandbox as second cohort launches
article.summary: Anthropic will provide Claude AI models to companies participating in the UK Financial Conduct Authority’s next Supercharged Sandbox cohort, as the regulator pushes to test AI applications in financial services.

headline: Galaxy Digital Seeks $3.5B Debt for Texas Expansion

article.title: Galaxy Digital Seeks $3.5 Billion Debt for Texas Data Center
article.summary: Galaxy Digital Inc. is planning to raise about $3.5 billion from a debut junk-bond sale to fund a data center tied to CoreWeave Inc., extending AI borrowing’s push into the riskier corners of the US credit market.

headline: Financials Face 30% Surge in Activist Targets

article.title: Financial Services Sector Seen as Focus for Activist Campaigns
article.summary: Financial services companies are attracting activist investors who see them as generating cash that could be paid out to investors, said Paul Weiss’ Carmen Lu.

headline: Franklin Templeton Backs AI as $1T Crypto Catalyst

article.summary: The good news: Bitcoin is holding onto key support, and rising. The bad news: a "death cross" is still active, and prediction markets are still overwhelmingly bearish.
